note: Unregistered interim Fowl Equipment source family for #398; no registry/runtime/Armory activation in this slice. Accepted after overshoot on r1; r2 gate-pass at preference underfill (20×23).
issue_exact_prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block with no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered Fowl Harvest Equipment item in three-quarter display angle for Combineplate Harness: broad storm-slate and rust-orange harvesting-machine chest plates with visible bolts and husk-green harness straps. The subject long side spans about 26–30 logical pixels, with at least two full magenta cells of clearance on every edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else in frame. Selective one-logical-pixel oil-ink outline. Use only named fowl-harvest-24 colors, 8–12 flat colors maximum. Structural members are at least three logical pixels thick. No Character, duck body, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, or transparency.
